BlackHook
Table of Contents

Namespace ClaySharp.Interop

Classes

ClayNative

Provides low-level, high-performance C# bindings to the native Clay layout library. Uses source-generated marshalling via LibraryImportAttribute and compiles with runtime marshalling disabled for zero-overhead, direct native transitions.

Structs

Arena

Defines a contiguous block of pre-allocated unmanaged memory that Clay uses for all structural and dynamic layout allocations.

AspectRatioElementConfig

Imposes aspect ratio constraints on a UI element.

AspectRatioElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for AspectRatioElementConfig elements.

BorderElementConfig

Configures styling properties for drawing borders around layout nodes.

BorderElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for BorderElementConfig elements.

BorderRenderData

Describes calculated border coordinates and stroke styling emitted inside border render commands.

BorderWidth

Specifies border stroke widths for each edge of a container.

BoundingBox

Defines a 2D bounding rectangle representing computed UI element placements.

ChildAlignment

Specifies how child elements are aligned within their parent container along both axes.

ClayString

A native string wrapper used by Clay to represent text safely across the ABI.

ClayStringSlice

Represents a slice or segment of a string. Used by Clay's text layout engine during wrapping and text rendering.

ClipElementConfig

Configures boundary clipping properties for layout nodes.

ClipElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for ClipElementConfig elements.

ClipRenderData

Describes clipping parameters emitted inside scissor/clip render commands.

Color

Represents a color using four floating-point components (Red, Green, Blue, Alpha).

Context

Opaque wrapper representing Clay's internal layout engine context context. This state should only be accessed via pointers returned by Clay_Initialize(Arena, Dimensions, ErrorHandler) or GetCurrentContext().

CornerRadius

Specifies corner rounding radii for rectangles, borders, and images.

CustomElementConfig

Custom element layout configuration block.

CustomElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for CustomElementConfig elements.

CustomRenderData

Describes a custom element payload emitted inside custom render commands.

DebugElementData

Structural debugging attributes associated with layout elements.

Dimensions

Represents standard 2D floating-point dimensions.

ElementConfig

Associates a layout configuration style with its category type identifier.

ElementConfigArraySlice

Represents a slice segment pointing into a native unmanaged array of ElementConfig entries.

ElementConfigUnion

Emulates an anonymous configuration C union inside ElementConfig, holding style detail pointers. Only one field should be accessed corresponding to the Type.

ElementData

Public structure containing calculated layout coordinates.

ElementDeclaration

Composite declaration structure encapsulating all layout, style, and rendering configs for a single UI element. Pass this to ConfigureOpenElement(ElementDeclaration) to apply styling.

ElementId

Holds unique identifiers generated by Clay to track element lifecycle, focus, and layout state.

ElementIdArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for ElementId elements.

ErrorData

Structure containing detailed diagnostic information returned when layout errors occur.

ErrorHandler

Holds callback function pointer registrations for native error handling.

FloatingAttachPoints

Defines target attachment points for floating elements.

FloatingElementConfig

Controls positioning, depth, and attachment behavior of floating (absolute positioned) UI elements.

FloatingElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for FloatingElementConfig elements.

ImageElementConfig

Holds image element render configurations.

ImageElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for ImageElementConfig elements.

ImageRenderData

Describes image content emitted inside image render commands.

LayoutConfig

Defines general layout configurations for element arrangement, spacing, and sizing.

LayoutConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for LayoutConfig elements.

LayoutElement

Represents a core layout node within Clay's internal structural layout tree.

LayoutElementChildren

Emulates an anonymous C-style union containing either list of child element indices or text element details. Field offsets overlap so only one field should be accessed corresponding to layout node type.

LayoutElementChildrenData

Holds list of child elements inside a container.

LayoutElementHashMapItem

Represents an entry in Clay's internal layout spatial hash map, used for fast lookup, hover, and layout calculation.

LayoutElementTreeNode

A layout tree node structure tracking hierarchical rendering positioning.

LayoutElementTreeRoot

Defines the entry root configurations for a layout tree rendering hierarchy.

MeasureTextCacheItem

Represents an item stored inside Clay's internal text measurement cache.

MeasuredWord

Holds sizing metadata for a single word computed during text layout wrapping.

Padding

Defines inner spacing padding values surrounding the children of a container.

PointerData

Contains pointer (e.g. mouse or touch) position and state information.

RectangleRenderData

Describes a filled background rectangle emitted inside rectangle render commands.

RenderCommand

Encapsulates a single drawing instruction emitted by Clay's layout resolver.

RenderCommandArray

Contiguous unmanaged array containing the list of RenderCommand elements computed for the current frame.

RenderData

Emulates an anonymous C union packing specific layout drawing payloads. Only one field should be accessed corresponding to the CommandType.

ScrollContainerData

Public structure containing scroll coordinates and dimensions for scrollable elements.

ScrollContainerDataInternal

Internal layout engine scroll tracker holding physics and position metadata for a scroll container.

SharedElementConfig

Represents style settings that are shared across multiple layout nodes.

SharedElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for SharedElementConfig elements.

Sizing

Defines layout sizing rules for both axes of a UI element.

SizingAxis

Specifies sizing rules and constraints for a single layout axis (either Width or Height).

SizingAxisValue

Emulates an anonymous C union representing a sizing constraint value. Field offsets overlap so that it can store either percentage values or min/max bounds.

SizingMinMax

Defines the minimum and maximum constraints for element dimensions.

StringArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for ClayString elements.

TextElementConfig

Provides configuration settings for rendering text elements.

TextElementConfigArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for TextElementConfig elements.

TextElementData

Holds layout and wrapping details computed specifically for text elements.

TextRenderData

Describes text content and style attributes emitted inside text render commands.

Vector2

Represents a standard 2D vector.

Warning

Structure packing diagnostic warning messaging.

WrappedTextLine

Describes a single computed line of text resulting from word wrapping operations.

WrappedTextLineArraySlice

Represents a slice segment pointing into an unmanaged array of wrapped text lines.

boolArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for boolean elements.

charArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for raw character bytes.

int32_tArray

Unmanaged array wrapper for 32-bit signed integers.

Enums

ElementConfigType

Specifies the type of layout configuration applied to a UI element. This configuration determines which rendering, sizing, or layout rules Clay applies to the element.

ErrorType

Defines the specific errors that can occur during layout calculation or configuration in Clay.

FloatingAttachPointType

Defines the attachment points on an element and its target when using floating (absolute) positioning.

FloatingAttachToElement

Identifies which element a floating container attaches to.

FloatingClipToElement

Controls whether a floating element should be clipped by another element's bounds.

LayoutAlignmentX

Controls horizontal alignment of children within a layout container.

LayoutAlignmentY

Controls vertical alignment of children within a layout container.

LayoutDirection

Defines the layout direction along which children are arranged.

PointerCaptureMode

Controls pointer capture behavior for floating elements.

PointerDataInteractionState

Represents the interaction state of a pointer (e.g. mouse or touch) on a UI element.

RenderCommandType

Specifies the rendering operation command type emitted in the output render command array.

SizingType

Determines how an element is sized along a layout axis.

TextAlignment

Specifies the horizontal alignment of text within its bounding container.

TextElementConfigWrapMode

Defines how text within a text element wraps.

Delegates

ClayNative.Clay_MeasureTextCallback

Defines the signature of the text measurement callback used by Clay to compute text dimensions.

ClayNative.OnHoverCallback

Defines the signature of the callback invoked when a pointer hovers over an element configured with an hover handler.

Made with docfx
